title: Fix buffalo (cattle) and customer adding functionality

requirements.text: Fix the 'Add Buffalo/Cattle' functionality so that submitting the CattleForm successfully creates a new cattle record in the backend and the new record appears in the cattle list without errors.

quotes: buffalo and customer adding not working

acceptanceCriteria: User can open the Add Cattle/Buffalo form and fill in all required fields
Submitting the form sends the correct data to the backend addCattle (or equivalent) method
The new cattle record appears in the cattle table immediately after submission
No console errors or silent failures occur during the add operation
Success feedback (toast or confirmation) is shown after adding

requirements.text: Fix the 'Add Customer' functionality so that submitting the CustomerForm successfully creates a new customer record in the backend and the new record appears in the customer list without errors.

quotes: buffalo and customer adding not working

acceptanceCriteria: User can open the Add Customer form and fill in all required fields (name, address, phone)
Submitting the form sends the correct data to the backend addCustomer (or equivalent) method
The new customer record appears in the customer table immediately after submission
No console errors or silent failures occur during the add operation
Success feedback (toast or confirmation) is shown after adding

constraints: Do not alter existing data models or remove any existing fields from the Cattle or Customer types
Do not break the edit or toggle-active functionality for cattle and customers
Preserve all existing Monthly Report, Delivery, and Milk Production functionality
nonGoals: Redesigning the cattle or customer forms
Adding new fields to cattle or customer records
Fixing any issues unrelated to the add operations for cattle and customers
